summary: Iteration 121: Four Critical Fixes Verified. All 13 backend tests PASSED (100%). Frontend panels verified: 21-Day Forecast opens OpsForecast module, Culinary Recipe Builder shows AI recipes with badges, Menu Engineering Matrix shows LIVE POS DATA.

ui_bugs.issue: Panel failed to load with 'Failed to fetch dynamically imported module' error when accessed via 'menu-engineering' key. Works correctly via 'Menu Engineering' sidebar link which uses 'menu-eng-matrix' key.
ui_bugs.note: Panel registry has both 'menu-engineering' and 'menu-eng-matrix' keys pointing to same module. The 'menu-engineering' key at line 690 uses simple import() while 'menu-eng-matrix' at line 855 uses createSafeModuleLoader. Recommend consolidating to single key.

action_items: Optional: Consolidate 'menu-engineering' and 'menu-eng-matrix' panel keys in panel-registry.ts to avoid confusion
critical_code_review_comments: P0 VERIFIED: Yield Database search API returns results with yield_pct, ap_cost_lb, ep_cost_lb
P0 VERIFIED: Fuzzy search returns matches for partial queries ('onio' -> 'Onion, Yellow', 'chick' -> 'Chicken', 'salm' -> 'Salmon')
P0 VERIFIED: IngredientsGrid fuzzy dropdown shows yield DB items with yield %, cost info (via Culinary Recipe Builder)
P0 VERIFIED: 21-Day Forecast panel opens OpsForecast module (data-testid='ops-forecast-panel') with Excel grid view
P1 VERIFIED: /api/yields/recipes returns both manual recipes and echoai3_generated AI recipes
P1 VERIFIED: AI recipes show source='echoai3_generated' and status='pending_approval' in response
P1 VERIFIED: CulinaryRecipeBuilder sidebar shows AI badge for echoai3_generated recipes (Lobster Thermidor, Truffle Mushroom Risotto)
P1 VERIFIED: Menu Engineering Matrix /api/menu-eng-matrix/outlets returns outlets from POS database with source='pos_database'
P1 VERIFIED: Menu Engineering Matrix /api/menu-eng-matrix/matrix returns items with data_source='pos_database'
P1 VERIFIED: Menu Engineering Matrix frontend shows 'LIVE POS DATA' indicator
P1 VERIFIED: Menu Engineering Matrix frontend dynamically picks first available outlet (BNQ) instead of hardcoded 'Signature Italian'
seed_data_creation: None required - existing POS data used
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 121 verified 4 critical fixes: (1) Yield Database search API with fuzzy matching at /api/yields/search - returns yield_pct, ap_cost_lb, ep_cost_lb. (2) IngredientsGrid.tsx connected to Yield DB API - fuzzy dropdown shows yield % and cost, auto-fills on selection. (3) 21-Day Forecast panel (key: forecast-21day) now loads OpsForecast module (data-testid='ops-forecast-panel') with Excel grid view. (4) /api/yields/recipes merges manual + echoai3_generated recipes - AI recipes show with AI badge and 'Pending' status in CulinaryRecipeBuilder sidebar. (5) Menu Engineering Matrix pulls from real POS database - shows 'LIVE POS DATA' indicator, outlets dynamically loaded (BNQ, REST, LNG, POOL).
